element_introduction_order.mastery_context: traversal and escape sequences throughout game

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: alternating between exploratory safe segments and action-driven sequences; character-driven narrative provides pacing breaks

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: side areas and dead-ends may contain items or alternative dialogue paths

difficulty_curve.early_game: tutorial-like introduction to mechanics via safe dialogue and simple item puzzles
difficulty_curve.mid_game: escalating combat complexity and environmental challenges
difficulty_curve.late_game: complex multi-step puzzles and climactic action sequences
notable_spikes: first combat encounter introduces action mechanics
late-game boss encounters requiring combat mastery

notable_level_patterns.description: central safe area with multiple adjacent zones containing puzzles, NPCs, and items
linear forward-moving motorcycle action with combat or timing pressures
multi-NPC dialogue trees requiring information gathering and conditional responses

extraction_notes: The Cutting Room Floor source provided did not contain substantive game design documentation. Data for this T2 extraction relies on general adventure game paradigm conventions and the game's documented genre (point-and-click adventure). Specific level design sequences, tension rhythm measurements, and spatial patterns would require access to design documents, interviews, or playthrough analysis not present in provided sources.
